finding: Cause: partial / complete obliteration of efferent ductules
chapter: Cause: obstruction + dilatation of efferent ductal system

differentials.name: Intratesticular spermatocele =  cyst containing mature spermatozoa
differentials.raw: Intratesticular spermatocele =  cyst containing mature spermatozoa

context: Age:   > 55 years Often associated with:   spermatocele Location:   mediastinum testis, frequently asymmetrically bilateral √  elliptical hypoechoic branching tubular structures ± cysts √  ± epididymal cysts / spermatoceles MR: √  hypointense on T1WI √  iso- to hyperintense on T2WI DDx:   teratoma Location:   attached to mediastinum testis √  multiple anechoic serpiginous tubules √  characteristic venous flow pattern increasing with Valsalva on Doppler Infrequently associated with: extratesticular varicocele
